nasb.text: And Jesus said to them, “Render to Caesar the things that are Caesar’s, and to God the things that are God’s.” And they were amazed at Him.

esv.text: Jesus said to them, “Render to Caesar the things that are Caesar’s, and to God the things that are God’s.” And they marveled at him.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“凱撒的應當歸給凱撒，　神的應當歸給　神。”他們就對他十分驚奇。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“属于凯撒的东西应该给凯撒，属于上帝的东西应该给上帝。” 他们听了这话，都很惊奇。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“凯撒的归给凯撒；神的归给神。”这使他们感到惊奇。
